title: Do you use monday to plan or manage social media campaigns?
excerpt:
If you’re using monday.com for marketing and deal with posting/scheduling social media content, we want to hear from you.

posts.author: MabRoj (Mabel Rojas)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you’re using monday.com for marketing and deal with posting/scheduling social media content, we want to hear from you.

We’re testing a new app built specifically for this, and we need real users to put it through its paces. Your feedback will directly shape how this tool works, so if you’ve ever thought “why doesn’t this just do X?” now’s your chance to make it happen.

Here’s the deal:

  • 8-day study (legit research platform)

  • Quick kick-off call, try some social media tasks, wrap-up chat

  • Share your honest thoughts, that’s literally it

We need people by 28.Nov.2025, so if you’re interested, check out the details and incentive info here: https://app.dscout.com/scouts/welcome/opportunity/CL495KBU79JETPOLPFL8OI60

Your experience matters. Let’s build something that actually works for you.

Note: We have a full consent form that covers exactly how we’ll handle your data, what we collect, and your rights as a participant. You’ll review and sign it before anything starts, no one’s asking you to commit to anything without seeing the full details first.
